arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta responds to Bukayo Saka demand with timely reminder
arts.sum: Arsenal face Southampton on Saturday looking for another Premier League victory, with Bukayo Saka this week insisting there's no more excuses, now they need to win major trophies

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta ready to call Aaron Ramsdale's bluff on Emirates return
arts.sum: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Aaron Ramsdale returns to the Emirates Stadium on Saturday to face his former side, having yet to taste a Premier League win at new club Southampton

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta suggests that he will look to confuse Aaron Ramsdale with set-piece plans as former Arsenal goalkeeper returns to Emirates Stadium with Southampton
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: The goalkeeper left the Gunners over the summer in a four-year deal worth up to £25million, having largely occupied the bench after losing his starting spot to David Raya.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta faces major selection problem for Southampton fixture
arts.sum: The Gunners could be without both Jurrien Timber and Ben White for the visit of Russell Martin's side on Saturday, meaning Mikel Arteta may have to juggle his pack and improvise

arts.ttl: Mikel Merino handed shock Spain recall despite Arsenal fitness concern
arts.sum: Luis de la Fuente has named his squad for Spain’s October UEFA Nations League double header with Arsenal star Mikel Merino recalled. De la Fuente’s team kicked off their campaign with a 0-0 draw in Serbia before cruising to a 4-1 win against Switzerland. arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal have a truly 'unbelievable' teenager who insiders now view as the future of the team's attack

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale makes Mikel Arteta feelings clear with honest Arsenal title claim
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsdale ended his Arsenal torment in the summer transfer window by signing for newly-promoted Southampton, and the goalkeeper's reason for the move was crystal clear

arts.ttl: Ramsdale's CLASSY message to Arsenal and Raya
arts.sum: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Aaron Ramsdale has heaped praise on David Raya ahead of his return to the Emirates Stadium this weekend. I do think it put pressure on David [Raya] at times as well.
